description.zh-cn: 数据备份：一键执行数据库 mysqldump 备份(自动 gzip 压缩)并存放于 storage/app/backups,后台查看/下载/删除备份文件,支持保留份数自动清理与 backup:run 命令(可加入 cron 定时备份)。
description.en: Data backup: one-click MySQL mysqldump backup (gzip-compressed) stored under storage/app/backups; list/download/delete backups in admin, configurable retention auto-cleanup and a backup:run command (cron-ready).
